title: Rhinopetalum gibbosum
taxonomy: Rhinopetalum gibbosum belongs to the family Asparagaceae. It is a genus within the Asparagaceae family, which also includes other plants like Asparagus and Agapanthus. Rhinopetalum gibbosum is a type of flowering plant that is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Rhinopetalum gibbosum is further divided into species based on its morphological characteristics and genetic makeup. More specific classification information may be found in botanical databases and scientific literature.
